name: Blake
role: A Security Architect who uses the auditing tool to identify potential vulnerabilities and weaknesses in AntigravityWorkspace_Q3's architecture, often trying to break or bypass its intended functionality.
behaviors: Attempts to access or modify architectural data and audit configurations without proper authorization.
Injects malicious payloads (e.g., SQL injection, XSS) into input fields for custom audit rules or component descriptions.
Floods the system with excessive audit requests or large data imports to test its resilience and denial-of-service prevention.
Explores undocumented API endpoints or parameters inferred from network traffic.

test_endpoints.name: Attempt unauthorized access to admin audit logs
Inject SQLi into custom audit rule definition

payload.name: SQLiTest
payload.definition: SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = 'admin' OR 1=1--

test_endpoints.name: Attempt to modify a critical component's metadata without authorization
Flood system with numerous audit requests (simulated single request)
Probe for undocumented internal debug endpoint
